inputs.label: Base City Rent
inputs.businessContext: Average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the base city.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the base city.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel şehirde 1 yatak odalı bir daire için ortalama aylık kira.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Monatsmiete für eine 1-Zimmer-Wohnung in der Basisstadt.

inputs.label: Base City Utilities
inputs.businessContext: Monthly cost of basic utilities (electricity, water, heating, garbage) for a standard apartment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly cost of basic utilities (electricity, water, heating, garbage) for a standard apartment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart bir daire için temel faturaların (elektrik, su, ısınma, çöp) aylık maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatliche Kosten für grundlegende Betriebskosten (Strom, Wasser, Heizung, Müll) für eine Standardwohnung.

inputs.label: Base City Groceries
inputs.businessContext: Monthly grocery bill for a single person in the base city.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly grocery bill for a single person in the base city.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel şehirde tek kişi için aylık market faturası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatliche Lebensmittelrechnung für eine Einzelperson in der Basisstadt.

inputs.label: Base City Transportation
inputs.businessContext: Monthly public transport pass or equivalent fuel costs in the base city.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly public transport pass or equivalent fuel costs in the base city.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel şehirde aylık toplu taşıma kartı veya eşdeğer yakıt maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatliche Fahrkarte für öffentliche Verkehrsmittel oder entsprechende Kraftstoffkosten in der Basisstadt.

inputs.label: Base City Misc. Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Other monthly living expenses (entertainment, clothing, personal care) in the base city.

businessContext_i18n.en: Other monthly living expenses (entertainment, clothing, personal care) in the base city.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel şehirde diğer aylık yaşam giderleri (eğlence, giyim, kişisel bakım).
businessContext_i18n.de: Andere monatliche Lebenshaltungskosten (Unterhaltung, Kleidung, Körperpflege) in der Basisstadt.

inputs.label: Target City Cost of Living Index
inputs.businessContext: Cost of living index of the target city, relative to base city = 100. A value above 100 means it is more expensive.

label_i18n.en: Target City Cost of Living Index
label_i18n.fr: Target City Cost of Living Index
label_i18n.es: Target City Cost of Living Index
label_i18n.ar: Target City Cost of Living Index

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of living index of the target city, relative to base city = 100. A value above 100 means it is more expensive.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedef şehrin yaşam maliyeti endeksi, temel şehir = 100. 100'ün üzeri daha pahalı olduğunu gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lebenshaltungskostenindex der Zielstadt, relativ zur Basisstadt = 100. Ein Wert über 100 bedeutet, dass es teurer ist.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
